_meta.reviewWorkflow: Local fetch with the bundled Codex Node failed because external network access is blocked in this environment, so this file was manually reviewed from original source pages before updating src/data/curated-news.json.

items.title: Gemmini v0.7.1 adds rectangular convolutions and new Timeloop configurations
items.summary: Gemmini v0.7.1 adds rectangular convolution support, new Timeloop configurations, area improvements for runtime-configurable dataflows, and faster build/elaboration time.
items.author: hngenc

items.title: Docker on RISC-V reaches near-release parity in six days with native RISC-V64 builds
items.summary: RISC-V International highlighted a community-maintained pipeline that delivered Docker v29 packages for RISC-V64 within six days using native hardware builds for Docker Engine, CLI, Compose, and Buildx.
items.author: RISC-V International Staff

items.title: OpenHW publishes CV32A60X 6.0.0 configuration release for TRL5 work
items.summary: The OpenHW CVA6 repository published CV32A60X 6.0.0 as a dedicated configuration release with an OBI-based pipeline hierarchy, no caches or PMP entries, and improved coverage, lint, and documentation.
items.author: ASintzoff

items.title: Call for Candidates: Help Us Build a Board That Represents Our Entire Ecosystem
items.summary: Board election announcement and nomination guidance from RISC-V International.
items.author: Andrea Gallo
items.reviewAction: Skipped as governance news without enough day-to-day technical signal

items.title: CHIPS Alliance - Our Vision and Priorities for 2026
items.summary: Community roadmap and organizational priorities across Caliptra, open PDKs, and AI-driven design.
